assessment_objectives.objective: the organization has processes to respond to data controls communications pertaining to data subject requests.
the organization has processes to respond to data controls communications pertaining to updating/correcting Personal Data (PD) under its control.
the organization has processes to respond to data controls communications pertaining to the disclosure of Personal Data (PD).

the organization has processes to respond to data controls communications pertaining to accounting for Personal Data (PD) that is stored, processed and/or transmitted on behalf of the data controller.
